description:
The Next-Gen Collaboration Suite

Lark is a next-generation office suite that integrates messaging, schedule management, collaborative documents, video conferencing, and many more applications in a single platform.
Docs
- In the Lark desktop app or web version, you can download Lark documents as Markdown files to easily edit and use them in other tools.
Base
- When selecting a field in Base for actions such as filtering, grouping, or sorting, you can search for the field name directly in the search box within the dropdown menu to quickly locate the target field. This improves efficiency, especially when your table contains a large number of fields.
